issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and missing required parameters. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 4 cards, (2) filtering for cards with [Trigger] keyword excluding [Lilith], (3) revealing and adding up to 1 to hand, (4) placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL lacks filter conditions, count limit (maxCount:1), and the reordering mechanic.
Filter is set to 'Any' but should specify: HasKeyword 'Trigger' AND NOT HasCardName containing 'Lilith' or similar exclusion logic
Missing second action to handle placement of non-selected cards at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL only captures the 'add to hand' portion.
